name: real-estate-currency-step-sets-site-currency-and-advances
description: Real-estate flow. New WEB_COLLECT_LISTINGS_CURRENCY step (parallel to salon's SALON_CURRENCY) asked once right after the agent profile. User replies 'PKR'; bot must store websiteData.currency='PKR' and advance to WEB_COLLECT_LISTINGS_ASK. This is the site-wide currency used as the default for every listing (real or placeholder) so a non-USD agent doesn't get '$' prices.
